page.name: REF: SLOT FX

pad1.name: S1 ECHO
pad1.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad1: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Echo' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad2.name: S2 REVERB
pad2.query: get_effect_name 2 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'reverb' ? effect_active 2 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad2: get_effect_name 2 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'reverb' ? effect_active 2 ? effect_active 2 off : effect_slider 2 1 45% & effect_slider 2 2 50% & effect_active 2 on : effect_select 2 'Reverb' & effect_slider 2 1 45% & effect_slider 2 2 50% & effect_active 2 on

pad3.name: S3 DELAY
pad3.query: get_effect_name 3 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'delay' ? effect_active 3 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad3: get_effect_name 3 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'delay' ? effect_active 3 ? effect_active 3 off : effect_slider 3 1 75% & effect_slider 3 2 50% & effect_active 3 on : effect_select 3 'Delay' & effect_slider 3 1 75% & effect_slider 3 2 50% & effect_active 3 on

pad4.name: S4 FLANGE
pad4.query: get_effect_name 4 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'flanger' ? effect_active 4 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad4: get_effect_name 4 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'flanger' ? effect_active 4 ? effect_active 4 off : effect_slider 4 1 50% & effect_active 4 on : effect_select 4 'Flanger' & effect_slider 4 1 50% & effect_active 4 on

pad5.name: S1 ECHO OUT
pad5.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo out' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad5: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo out' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 80% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_slider 1 1 80% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad6.name: S1 LOOP ROLL
pad6.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad6: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Loop Roll' & effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad7.name: S1 PHASER
pad7.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'phaser' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad7: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'phaser' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Phaser' & effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad8.name: S1 BEATGRID
pad8.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'beatgrid' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad8: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'beatgrid' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'BeatGrid' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on
page.pad13: effect_active 1 off & effect_active 2 off & effect_active 3 off & effect_active 4 off & effect_stems off
